title: BetterCombat x Fantasy Weapons
description: BetterCombat x Fantasy Weapons Compatibility Datapack
body:
**BetterCombat x Fantasy Weapons** — is a datapack that offers compatibility between the missing [Fantasy Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_weapons) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat). 

## ⚙️ Compatibility

* [Fantasy Weapons (Medieval Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_weapons)
* [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
* [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
